name: Pumpkin Chiffon Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 graham cracker crust (8 or 9 inches in)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the whipped topping and mix well.
3. Spread into the prepared crust.
4. In another bowl, beat the milk and pudding mixes on low speed until combined.
5. Beat on high for 2 minutes.
6. Stir in the pumpkin and spices; mix well.
7. Spread over the cream cheese layer.
8. Chill.
9. Garnish with nuts and/or more whipped topping if desired.
